name: North Gate

portal.message: The road coach brings you to Northgate.
The road coach returns you to Briarwatch.

actions.response: The posting says the last trade manifest was misplaced in the storehouse.
Search the storehouse ledger desk for the missing manifest.
The clerk restores the manifest to the road ledger and marks the job paid.

description: The reeve's board carries road notices, work offers, and a missing manifest posting.
name: Northgate Notice Board

actions.response: The smith refits, sharpens, and oils your equipped gear.

description: A maintained workbench for fitting, sharpening, and repairing travel gear.
name: Northgate Repair Bench
